A2#8.notes: Refactored the subset-recursion block in create_aggregated_features (timeseries.py:395-450): pulls subset column into a numpy view once per subset_var, computes boolean mask once per value via np.flatnonzero, drives a single window_df.iloc[pos_idx] slice. Pre-fix flow: window_df[mask] then window_df[~mask] when len<=1 = 2 full pandas boolean-index materialisations per subset value. Post-fix: ONE slice after we know which set to keep, complement via numpy ~bm on already-cached mask. Behavioural equivalence pinned via rtol=1e-12 baseline snapshot across 3-level subset workload (5 sensors).
